title: DARPA Research Labs
summary: The second Episode 2 main mission, focused on stopping Black Tusk from extracting strategically valuable DARPA prototypes beneath the Pentagon.

claims.text: DARPA Research Labs is one of the two Episode 2 main missions set within the Pentagon operation.
Black Tusk reaches the underground laboratories through flooded tunnels and prepares to extract DARPA prototypes and other strategic assets through an abandoned Cold War tunnel network.
Division Agents are tasked with confronting Black Tusk and securing those assets.

paragraphs.text: The mission moves below the Pentagon into DARPA facilities, where Agents must interrupt Black Tusk's planned extraction through Cold War-era tunnels.

verification.notes: Prototype names and encounter details are withheld until direct mission evidence is captured.
